name: HWR_SRVY_QSTN_BASE_VL
query: SELECT B.SUBSCRIBER_ID, B.SUBSCRIBER_CODE, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID, B.QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION, T.QUESTIONNAIRE_NAME, B.QUESTION_ID, B.QUESTION_VERSION, T.QUESTION_TEXT, B.QUESTION_OWNER, B.QUESTION_TYPE, B.QUESTION_TIMESTAMP, B.QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_1, B.QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_2, B.QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_3, B.QUESTIONS_BASE_ATTR_4, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_SRVY_QSTN_BASE_B B, HWR_SRVY_QSTN_BASE_TL T WHERE B.SUBSCRIBER_ID = T.SUBSCRIBER_ID AND B.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID = T.QUESTIONNAIRE_ID AND B.QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION = T.QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION AND B.QUESTION_ID = T.QUESTION_ID AND B.QUESTION_VERSION = T.QUESTION_VERSION AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
